title: unintentional static in verilated_threads
body:
https://github.com/verilator/verilator/blob/6ec5c85beaeb362a4a35c9c843a6b28e639f7d59/include/verilated_threads.cpp#L162-L168


found via asan/valgrind

```
==53153== Invalid read of size 1
==53153==    at 0x735B23A: ____strtol_l_internal
==53153==    by 0x6971A0: atoi (stdlib.h:363)
==53153==    by 0x6971A0: VlThreadPool::numaAssign() (verilated_threads.cpp:167)
==53153==  Address 0x8a73b13 is 0 bytes after a block of size 35 alloc'd
```


The static keyword caused pos to retain stale values across iterations, leading to out-of-bounds reads when accessing line.c_str() + pos + 1.
